response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video for any vocal music. 2. Confirmed the audio consists only of speech from the streamer and ambient instrumental background music. 3. Concluded no vocal songs are present, so no lyric lookup is required.
response.global_summary: The video shows a VTuber streaming while cooking a spice curry. The audio consists entirely of conversational speech and background instrumental music. No songs with vocals are played.
